name: agent-bridge
description: Localhost HTTP bridge so external agents can drive marimo notebooks via vscode.commands.executeCommand.

agentBridge.enabled.description: Start the localhost HTTP bridge when a marimo notebook is opened. Disable to keep the extension installed without spawning the server (useful if you want the marimo notebook editor only).

agentBridge.eagerStart.description: Start the HTTP server as soon as VS Code activates the bridge, instead of waiting for a marimo notebook to open. Useful for test harnesses that need to call marimo.openAsMarimoNotebook through the bridge before any notebook is open.

agentBridge.port.description: Port for the bridge HTTP server. 0 = auto-pick (port written to the discovery file under <globalStorage>/agent-bridge.json).

agentBridge.token.description: Optional bearer token. If empty, no auth (localhost-only). Set for shared dev machines.
